candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue line; appears populated across all years and is more direct than the subtotal duplicate.
Revenue-related but appears unpopulated and narrower than total company revenue.
Revenue-related but appears unpopulated and may be only one component of revenue.
Valid top-line subtotal, but duplicate of Revenue values; use as fallback priority after Revenue.
COGS, not revenue.
Non-operating income, not sales revenue.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Investment income, not operating revenue.
Bottom-line profit measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Reversal of fair value adjustments of derivative financial instruments, transferred to the income statement
candidates.why: OCI/derivative-related, not revenue.
Balance-sheet liability item, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using Revenue as primary and Total Revenue as fallback priority label because both appear to represent the same top-line amount.

candidates.why: Direct production costs and numerically matches reported COGS.
Explicit COGS label; best semantic match for direct costs.

candidates.row_label: Borrowing costs recognised in the cost of assets

Inventory component on balance sheet, not period expense COGS.
Balancing row that excludes depreciation; not preferred over explicit COGS row.

candidates.why: Core SG&A-type overhead bucket above EBIT; best populated overhead component.
Possible overhead component, but narrower and less clearly SG&A than administrative/selling costs.
Personnel cost overhead candidate, but likely broader and supplemental rather than primary income-statement SG&A line.
Explicit SG&A label exists, but preview is empty; per rule include with overhead bucket for coverage.
Depreciation should be excluded from SG&A components under the rules.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization should be excluded from SG&A components.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists but appears unpopulated in preview, so included it plus the main overhead bucket per rule. Manual review flagged because 'Administrative expenses and selling costs' appears twice in the sheet with different values, and the JSON schema cannot distinguish which duplicate occurrence is intended; the larger operating-expense line is the intended mapping.
No dedicated research/development row is visible in the income statement preview.

candidates.why: Interest-related but appears unpopulated and may be investment-related rather than financing cost.
Broad finance-cost total, but less preferred than granular recurring interest components.

Non-controlling interest allocation, not interest expense.

Equity item, not interest expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used granular recurring interest components and excluded broad Financial expenses to avoid mixing in FX/fair value/non-interest items.

candidates.why: Non-controlling interest allocation in income statement, not book equity.
